name: Oatmeal-Almond Fudge Bars
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Spray a 9-inch baking pan with nonstick cooking spray.
Whisk together baking soda, salt, and flour. Set aside.
In a large bowl, mix together brown sugar, 1/2 cup butter, and 1 teaspoon vanilla.
Beat until creamy. Gradually blend in the flour mixture. Stir in cornflakes, oats,
and 1/2 cup almonds. Stir well. Set aside.
Place remaining dough into baking pan. Melt chocolate chips and 1 tablespoon
remaining butter together over low heat. Add 1 cup almonds, condensed milk,
1 teaspoon vanilla, and salt. Blend well. Press this mixture over cookie mixture.
Crumble reserved cup of dough over top. Bake for 30 minutes.
Cool and cut into bars. Drizzle with melted vanilla extract.
